title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Ecom Express - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Ecom Express - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Ecom Express invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Digital Marketing Manager at our Ghaziabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Ecom Express:
Ecom Express is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ecom Express!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
